reviews.comment:
Buena atención, rápida, el hombre que limpio el parabrisas excelente. Si sos socio ACA es tu estación de servicio.

(Translated by Google)
Great service, fast, the man who cleaned the windshield was excellent. If you're an ACA member, this is your service station.

reviews.comment:
Ubicado en pleno centro de Tandil, ofrece sandwich y haburguesas para almorzar/cenar a precios muy accesibles. La atencion es excelente, para ir al baño tenes que pedir la llave al playero.

(Translated by Google)
Located right in the heart of Tandil, this place offers sandwiches and hamburgers for lunch/dinner at very affordable prices. The service is excellent; to use the restroom, you have to ask the attendant for the key.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/8137682330194139512/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUMtektubnpnRRAB
